verdict: Excellent timing and rhythmic representation, but severely marred by a disorienting spin stream and an unplayable 16th-note crossover.

issues.problem: The stream pattern repeats 'D, U, R, L' three times consecutively, forcing a highly disorienting 360-degree spin on the pad or requiring awkward double-tapping to face forward.

The 16th-note run 'D -> L -> R -> D -> U' contains an extremely awkward double crossover (stepping L with the Right foot, then R with the Left foot) at 130 BPM, which is highly prone to causing trips.
